subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath beheld the proof and believed in the All-Merciful when He descended from the heaven of utterance with sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن رای البرهان و آمن بالرحمن اذ اتی من سماء البیان بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
